name: CountryAssessment
description: A USCIRF assessment of a country's international religious freedom conditions, including designation status and policy recommendations.

country_name.description: Name of the country being assessed.

report_year.description: Year of the USCIRF annual report covering this assessment.

designation_status.description: USCIRF recommended designation for this country.

state_department_designation.description: Actual U.S. State Department designation, if different from USCIRF recommendation.

religious_minorities_at_risk.description: Religious minority groups identified as facing persecution or discrimination.

key_violations.description: Key categories of religious freedom violations documented.

report_url.description: URL to the full USCIRF country report.

recommendations.description: Policy recommendations USCIRF makes to the U.S. government regarding this country.

severity_level.description: Overall severity level of religious freedom violations.
